sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Locks In Google Deal: Can XEL Break $100 in 2026?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy (XEL) has secured a significant deal to power Google's new data center in Minnesota, contributing to a 24% rise in its stock from its 52-week low. This agreement highlights Xcel's pivot from a traditional utility to an AI infrastructure provider, supported by a $60 billion capital plan and a target of 6 gigawatts in contracted data center capacity by 2027. Despite potential wildfire liabilities, analysts and TIKR's model suggest significant upside for XEL stock, with projections far exceeding its current price.

feed.title: Hackers impersonate Microsoft Teams help desk to breach corporate networks
feed.summary: A new report from Mandiant reveals that a threat cluster, UNC6692, is impersonating Microsoft Teams help desk workers to distribute data-stealing malware. The attack involves email flooding, phishing through Teams, and tricking victims into installing a malicious browser extension called SnowBelt. This extension acts as a backdoor, allowing attackers to access and navigate corporate systems, utilizing social engineering tactics like browser-specific prompts and deliberate login failures to enhance their success.
feed.source: The Record from Recorded Future News
feed.source_domain: The Record from Recorded Future News

feed.title: Rising AI Fears Hurt CoStar Group (CSGP) in Q1
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) experienced a stock decline in Q1 2026, primarily attributed to market fears regarding the impact of AI on various industries, including software and information services. Despite this, Baron Focused Growth Fund continues to hold CSGP, citing its strong data assets, growth opportunities in real estate information, and a robust business model with high recurring revenue. The fund believes the market is overreacting to AI risks without fundamental evidence and expects CoStar's cash flow to improve over time as investment in Homes.com moderates.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Price Target Raised to $145.00 at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $145.00 from $118.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 17.88% upside. This comes despite ConocoPhillips missing recent quarterly earnings estimates and significant insider share sales. The energy producer currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with an average price target of $132.44.

feed.title: The Real Brokerage Acquires RE/MAX Holdings for $880 Million
feed.summary: The Real Brokerage Inc. announced its acquisition of RE/MAX Holdings Inc. for approximately $880 million. The combined entity, to be known as Real REMAX Group, will encompass over 100,000 real estate professionals and will be headquartered in Miami with significant operations in Denver. The transaction, expected to close in the second half of the year, aims to create a more innovative and connected real estate ecosystem.

feed.title: Fraud EDU: Fake surveys; fake summons – how Regions Bank is helping consumers fight back
feed.summary: Regions Bank is actively educating consumers about prevalent digital scams, specifically focusing on fake court summons and phony online surveys. These schemes aim to steal personal and financial information by exploiting trust and fear. The bank emphasizes vigilance and provides resources to help customers recognize red flags and protect themselves from evolving fraud tactics.

feed.title: AIG Completes CEO Succession Plan With Anderson to Takes Reins
feed.summary: American International Group Inc. (AIG) officially announced that Eric Anderson will become its new president and CEO on June 1, succeeding Peter Zaffino who will transition to executive chair of the board. This announcement on April 27, 2026, marks the successful conclusion of a succession plan first revealed in January. Anderson, formerly of Aon Plc, joined AIG in February, while Zaffino has led the company since March 2021.

feed.title: Why Intuitive Surgical Is a Strong Buy as Robotic Surgery Adoption Accelerates
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is considered a strong buy despite a recent stock decline, trading at a 20% discount to its 52-week high. The company reported robust Q1 2026 results with non-GAAP EPS of $2.50 and revenue up 23% year-over-year, driven by accelerated adoption of its da Vinci 5 systems. Analysts at 24/7 Wall St. set a price target of $615.93, indicating a 28% upside potential as robotic surgery adoption continues to grow.

feed.title: Hershey’s new sustainability strategy offers blueprint for balancing business & ESG needs
feed.summary: Hershey has unveiled a new sustainability strategy called "Source. Make. Delight." which shifts from long-term pledges to practical, data-driven execution across sourcing, manufacturing, and consumer-facing innovation. This approach aims to embed sustainability into core business operations, addressing the tensions between cost, resilience, and impact while navigating evolving consumer expectations and regulatory environments. The strategy is designed to be an evolving internal operating system, providing a blueprint for other companies to integrate ESG into their day-to-day decision-making.

feed.title: KeyBanc raises Reliance Steel stock price target on strong results
feed.summary: KeyBanc increased its price target for Reliance Steel & Aluminum (NYSE:RS) to $378 from $341, maintaining an Overweight rating, following the company's strong first-quarter 2026 results. The analyst adjusted projections based on improved gross margins and new contracts. Reliance Steel is viewed as a core industrial holding, supported by strong free cash flow, diversified macro exposure, and consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Assessing Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) has experienced recent share price volatility, with a 1-day decline of 1% and a 7-day decline of 6%, though its 1-year and 3-year total shareholder returns are significantly positive. The stock is currently trading at $190.55, which is about a 20% discount to one intrinsic value estimate of $198.74, suggesting it might be undervalued based on growth and margin assumptions. However, another valuation angle using the P/E ratio suggests the stock is richly tagged compared to its fair ratio and peer average, trading at 20.8x P/E against a fair ratio of 16.2x.

feed.title: MiniMed not aware of compromises, doesn’t expect impact from Medtronic cyber breach
feed.summary: MiniMed has stated in an SEC filing that it does not expect to be materially impacted by a recent cybersecurity breach at its parent company, Medtronic. Medtronic confirmed an unauthorized party accessed data in some of its corporate IT systems but noted no impact on products, patient safety, or financial reporting. MiniMed emphasized that its own IT systems remain uncompromised and it anticipates no material effect on its business or financial results.

feed.title: Citic Adjusts Price Target on Texas Instruments to $310 From $240, Maintains Add Rating
feed.summary: Citic has increased its price target for Texas Instruments (TXN) to $310 from $240, while reaffirming an "Add" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook by the analyst firm on the semiconductor company's prospects. The article also provides a brief overview of Texas Instruments' business segments and geographical sales distribution.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts American Electric Power Price Target to $136 From $137, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for American Electric Power (AEP) to $136, down from $137, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for AEP, with some raising and others lowering their price targets for the utility company. American Electric Power is a major electricity producer and distributor, with significant operations in generation, transmission, and distribution.

feed.title: Algorhythm Holdings, Inc. to Present at Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Algorhythm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIME) will participate in the Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5, 2026, with CEO Gary Atkinson presenting at 1:40 PM ET. The summit, held at the historic Bank of New York, will feature presentations, one-on-one meetings, and discussions with notable figures like Alex Rodriguez and Grant Cardone. Algorhythm, through its SemiCab platform, specializes in AI-powered logistics solutions to optimize global supply chains.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts DTE Energy Price Target to $155 From $156, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for DTE Energy (DTE) to $155, down from $156, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This update reflects a slight modification in the analyst's valuation of the electric utility company. DTE Energy specializes in electricity production and distribution, serving millions of customers in Michigan, along with energetic product trading and natural gas transmission.

feed.title: Halliburton wraps up Greenland frontier exploration deal
feed.summary: Halliburton has completed a frontier exploration deal in Greenland, with Greenland Energy targeting a two-well onshore drilling campaign this year. The deal focuses on exploration activities in the region, as reported by Upstream.

feed.title: Algorhythm CEO Gary Atkinson takes May 5 Wall Street summit slot
feed.summary: Algorhythm Holdings (NASDAQ: RIME) CEO Gary Atkinson will present at the Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5, 2026, at 1:40 PM ET on Wall Street, an event featuring company presentations, fireside chats, and one-on-one meetings. This participation highlights the company's continuous efforts in investor outreach following recent milestones like strong 2025 revenue growth and the rising Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) of its SemiCab platform. The announcement emphasizes Algorhythm's AI-powered logistics strategy and its commitment to increasing visibility within the investment community.

feed.title: Relay Therapeutics (Nasdaq: RLAY) plans Phase 3 breast cancer trial for zovegalisib
feed.summary: Relay Therapeutics announced plans for a Phase 3 frontline trial of its PI3Kα inhibitor, zovegalisib, in combination with atirmociclib and an aromatase inhibitor for PIK3CA-mutated, HR+/HER2- advanced or metastatic breast cancer. This decision follows promising early clinical data from a Phase 1/2 trial, which showed a 44% objective response rate and manageable safety in heavily pre-treated patients. Pfizer will supply the other drugs for the trial, which is expected to begin in early 2027.

feed.title: Related Digital and Blackstone secure $16 billion to build Oracle's Michigan AI data center
feed.summary: Related Digital and Blackstone have successfully secured $16 billion to finance the construction of Oracle's new AI data center in Michigan. This significant investment will support the development of a critical infrastructure project for Oracle's artificial intelligence capabilities.

feed.title: Callable Treasury‑linked notes from JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM) with ≥6.60% factor
feed.summary: JPMorgan Financial is offering callable senior notes linked to the 10-Year Constant Maturity Treasury Rate, featuring a variable interest rate of at least 6.60% per annum. Interest accrues only on days when the Reference Rate is at or below a 5.00% barrier, with quarterly payments beginning July 28, 2026, and a maturity date of April 28, 2031. The notes are callable by JPMorgan on specified quarterly Redemption Dates, and investors face risks including credit risk and the variable nature of interest payments.

feed.title: The next phase of the Microsoft-OpenAI partnership
feed.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI have announced an amended agreement to simplify their partnership, focusing on flexibility, certainty, and broad AI benefits. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's primary cloud partner, with OpenAI products continuing to ship first on Azure, but OpenAI can now serve customers across any cloud provider. Microsoft will also retain a non-exclusive license to OpenAI's IP through 2032 and will no longer pay a revenue share to OpenAI, though revenue share payments from OpenAI to Microsoft will continue through 2030, with Microsoft remaining a major shareholder.

feed.title: Guggenheim Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
feed.summary: Guggenheim has increased its price target for Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) to $1,235 from $985, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting an 11.4% upside. This follows similar upward adjustments from other major analysts like Citigroup and JPMorgan, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus. Despite slightly missing recent quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, Equinix showed 7% year-over-year revenue growth, and institutional ownership remains very high at 94.9%.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Price Target Raised to $222.00
feed.summary: Scotiabank has raised its price target for Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) to $222.00, citing an "outperform" rating, with other analysts also increasing their targets. The company recently met earnings expectations, reporting $0.46 EPS and strong revenue growth, although its shares trade at a premium valuation with significant institutional ownership. The consensus price target for DLR is now $212.07 with a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) Earns Buy Rating from Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG), setting a price target of $258.00, suggesting a potential upside of 20.9% from its current price. This endorsement comes despite Q1 revenue missing estimates, though EPS beat expectations. The article also notes significant institutional ownership and a recent insider stock sale.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Gartner, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2026, and February 8, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding its contract value growth potential and consulting segment revenue outlook, while minimizing risks. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm to discuss their legal rights, with a deadline of May 18, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) Rating Increased to Overweight at KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp has upgraded MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) from a "sector weight" to an "overweight" rating, setting a new target price of $117.00, suggesting a significant upside. This upgrade comes amidst mixed analyst ratings from other firms, with the consensus remaining "Hold" and an average price target of $46.81. The article also details recent insider transactions and institutional trading activity for MGM.

feed.title: Powell Industries (NASDAQ:POWL) Coverage Initiated at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. initiated coverage on Powell Industries (NASDAQ:POWL) with an "overweight" rating and a $310.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 22.65%. This report comes amidst other analyst ratings ranging from "strong-buy" to "hold" and significant insider selling activity, with major shareholders and executives divesting shares totaling over $44 million in the last three months. The company recently posted strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates with $1.13 EPS on $251.18 million in revenue.

feed.title: Microsoft’s Q3 FY2026 Earnings Test: Will Azure Re-Accelerate or Extend Its Deceleration?
feed.summary: Investors are closely watching Microsoft's Q3 FY2026 earnings report on April 29 to see if Azure's growth re-accelerates past the 38% guided ceiling or if its deceleration continues. The company's AI monetization through Microsoft 365 Copilot and the impressive Commercial RPO of $625 billion are also key focus areas. The report will provide critical insights into whether Microsoft's substantial AI infrastructure investments are entering a monetization phase or if heavy spending needs to be sustained.

feed.title: Clearing the Runway: Boeing’s Q1 2026 Results Show 14% Revenue Growth and Narrowing Losses
feed.summary: The Boeing Company reported a 14% year-over-year revenue increase to $22,217 million for Q1 2026, driven by higher commercial airplane deliveries. The company also narrowed its GAAP net loss to ($7) million from ($31) million in the prior-year quarter, with core loss per share improving to ($0.20). Boeing highlighted strong demand, a record $695 billion backlog, and progress in certifications for its 737 MAX and 777X programs, while acknowledging ongoing risks related to industry conditions, supply chain, and production quality.

feed.title: RLI starts 2026 strong, stays disciplined as E&S softens
feed.summary: RLI Insurance Company began 2026 with strong financial results, including an 86% combined ratio and 3% premium growth, despite some catastrophe losses. The company is maintaining underwriting discipline as the E&S market softens due to increased competition and re-entry of admitted carriers. RLI is leveraging producer relationships and selective underwriting, while also exploring opportunities in "wheels-based" products and utilizing AI to enhance decision-making.

feed.title: PRLD Maintained by HC Wainwright & Co. -- Price Target Raised to $8
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. analyst Robert Burns maintained a 'Buy' rating for Prelude Therapeutics (PRLD) and raised the price target to $8 from $5, a 60% increase. The positive outlook is based on the company's innovative pipeline in oncology. Despite a low GF Score™ of 37/100, indicating financial challenges, insider buying of $25.0 million in the past three months suggests confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: First BanCorp. upgraded to Strong Buy at Raymond James after Q1 results (FBP:NYSE)
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded First BanCorp. (FBP) to "Strong Buy" from "Outperform" after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter financial results. The bank's Q1 non-GAAP EPS was $0.57, surpassing expectations by $0.06, with revenue of $258.65M, aligning with forecasts.

feed.title: Beata Kirr takes on portfolios for 550 Northern Trust family-office clients
feed.summary: Northern Trust Wealth Management has appointed Beata Kirr as Chief Investment Officer of Global Family Office (GFO). In this role, Kirr will be responsible for overseeing investment strategy, leading portfolio construction, and providing investment insights for over 550 ultra-high-net-worth families and family offices. Kirr brings extensive experience from her previous roles at The Copia Group and Bernstein Private Wealth Management, and GFO President Dino De Vita highlighted her disciplined approach to asset allocation and manager selection.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International's all-inclusive package makes Vegas trips easy and economical
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has introduced an all-inclusive package at Luxor and Excalibur designed to simplify and economize quick getaways to Las Vegas. Starting at $330 plus tax for a two-day experience, the package includes dining options at several MGM properties, entertainment tickets to various shows, and attractions, with resort fees and parking also covered. The booking is for double occupancy, managed through the MGM Rewards app, and offers significant savings for visitors.

feed.title: Facebook posts promoting discounted Tractor Supply riding mowers if you fill out survey are scams
feed.summary: Facebook posts advertising Tractor Supply Co. riding lawn mowers for less than $10 after filling out a survey are scams. These fraudulent schemes misuse the company's name and logo to lure consumers into hidden monthly subscription fees. Victims are advised to contact their bank and report the fraud to the Federal Trade Commission.

feed.title: Luxembourg: Astorg to acquire Thermo Fisher Scientific’s microbiology business for US$1.075bn
feed.summary: Astorg, a private equity firm, has agreed to acquire Thermo Fisher Scientific's microbiology business for approximately US$1.075 billion. The microbiology business, which generated US$645 million in revenue in 2025, provides antimicrobial susceptibility testing and culture media solutions. Astorg plans to partner with management to accelerate organic growth, pursue M&A, and strengthen operational capabilities for the newly independent platform.

feed.title: [ARS] STURM RUGER & CO INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Sturm Ruger & Co Inc (RGR) on April 27, 2026, with a low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides details about the filing, including its type, acceptance date, and links to the original document on SEC EDGAR. The page also offers an overview of RGR's stock performance rankings, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: School nutrition program reaching 11,000 wins Campbell’s Halo Award
feed.summary: Alliance for a Healthier Generation and The Campbell's Company received the 2026 Gold Halo Award for their Full Futures school nutrition program. This partnership aims to improve student health and food access in schools through pillars like culture, infrastructure, nutrition education, and food access. The program has engaged over 11,000 participants through initiatives including community farmers markets, school gardens, and culinary education.

feed.title: Power Solutions International, Inc. Investigated by the Portnoy Law Firm
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has launched an investigation into potential securities fraud involving Power Solutions International, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSIX) following a significant drop in the company's stock price. This investigation comes after a revised outlook from the company, projecting a slowdown in sales growth for 2025 that negatively impacted investor confidence. The firm is encouraging affected investors to contact them to discuss their legal options for recovering losses.

feed.title: Booking Holdings posts Q1 results at 4 p.m., call starts at 4:30
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, at approximately 4:00 p.m. ET via a press release on its Investor Relations website. A conference call to discuss these results will follow at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, with a live webcast and audio replays available for seven days. Historically, similar earnings-timing announcements have resulted in modest stock price movements.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Pinterest, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) investors who purchased securities between February 7, 2025, and February 12, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Pinterest failed to disclose reduced revenues from advertising partners and its inability to manage the impact of U.S. tariffs, which led to a significant stock price drop after the company announced lower-than-expected financial results and guidance on February 12, 2026. Investors have until May 29, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: A 30-minute Honeywell CFO webcast is scheduled for May 19
feed.summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) announced its CFO, Mike Stepniak, will present at Wolfe Research's Global Transportation and Industrials Conference on May 19, 2026, from 8:00–8:30 a.m. EDT. A real-time audio webcast will be available on Honeywell’s Investor Relations site, www.honeywell.com/investor, along with related materials, and a replay will be accessible for 30 days after the event. The presentation will cover company updates and information on Honeywell's integrated operating system.

feed.title: Copilot adds Gen financial guidance for cards, loans and insurance
feed.summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN) announced that its Engine product will be integrated into Microsoft Copilot, MSN, and Bing to provide compliant, real-time financial insights and offers, covering credit cards, deposits, loans, and insurance. This collaboration aims to offer accurate, personalized financial guidance directly within Microsoft's digital experiences, with initial rollouts already underway. Despite the strategic integration, GEN's stock saw a moderate negative reaction, declining 2.73%.

feed.title: WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. LAUNCHES DORMIFY
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. has announced the launch of its tenth brand, Dormify, targeting students and young consumers in dorm and small living spaces. Dormify offers modern, functional home furnishings through its new website, providing curated content, design tools, and personalized shopping guidance. The brand also introduces a "Pick-Up Near Campus™" program, leveraging Williams-Sonoma's retail network for convenient order pickup.

feed.title: WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. LAUNCHES DORMIFY
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) has launched Dormify, its tenth brand, aimed at students and young consumers needing solutions for dorms and compact living spaces. Dormify offers modern, functional home furnishings and a "Pick-Up Near Campus™" program, leveraging Williams-Sonoma's retail network. This expansion targets the small-space living market, allowing the company to connect with the next generation of customers.

feed.title: Adobe downgraded at Mizuho amid 'weakened' conviction
feed.summary: Mizuho downgraded Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) from Buy to Neutral, citing "weakened" conviction in the stock. This adjustment comes despite the company's strong positioning in digital media and marketing, as Mizuho reassesses its investment thesis. Further details regarding the reasons for the downgrade were not immediately available.

feed.title: AbbVie’s Q1 2026 Preview: Can Skyrizi and Rinvoq Sustain a $7B Quarterly Immunology Run Rate?
feed.summary: AbbVie is preparing to report its Q1 2026 earnings, with investors focused on whether its immunology drugs, Skyrizi and Rinvoq, can continue rapid growth to offset Humira's biosimilar erosion. The combined sales of these two drugs exceeded the company's 2027 target two years early, reaching $25.866 billion in FY2025. The company's Q1 2026 results will be scrutinized for sustained immunology growth, potential updates to its full-year EPS guidance, and the performance of its diversified pipeline in neuroscience, aesthetics, and oncology.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Essex Property Trust to $272 From $271, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $272 from $271, while reiterating an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a minor positive revision in Barclays' outlook for the residential REIT. The article notes this change amidst several other recent analyst adjustments for Essex Property Trust.

feed.title: RELX PLC’s Small Share Listing Puts Bigger AI and Buyback Test Back in Focus
feed.summary: RELX PLC made a small share listing for its employee plan, following a £350 million buyback and strong shareholder support. The larger question for investors is how RELX's AI strategy and pricing power will hold up against increasing competition in the professional workflow space, especially after Freshfields and Anthropic announced new legal AI tool developments. Despite concerns, analyst Rob Hales views RELX as deeply undervalued, believing AI innovation will benefit the company.
